title: SIMPLY: Mincaland
description: An enhance of the vanilla Minecraft experience focused on details, performance, visuals, QOL and more...
body:
- An enhance of the vanilla Minecraft experience focused on details -

![----------------------------------](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b0d41344f2959c515cefcc1f281aaf195417988.png)

Longer adventure with new challenges.
Creating a more immersive and dynamic world
Soft gameplay adjustments for a smoother and more relaxed experience
Designed for those who want to take it easy
Maintaining the core balance of the original experience


![----------------------------------](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b0d41344f2959c515cefcc1f281aaf195417988.png)

Features


This modpack contains over 150 mods, some of the features that this mods inlcudes are:


- **Biomes & Structures** - Explore all the enhanced vanilla biomes with new structures - **Visuals** - Visual enhancment to blocks, ambience and more.. - **Unique Gear** - Discover rare items with special abilities and customization options. - **Alternative End** - A fresh take on the End dimension and Ender Dragon fight. - **Quality of Life** - Simplified gameplay with smoother mechanics for daily tasks. - **Performance** - Optimized for minimal lag and a seamless gaming experience.

If you'd like to use these mods for personal enjoyment, please download them from their original sources to support the creators.


MOD LIST ||| |----------------------------|-------------------| | [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem) | Revamps the End dimension with new features and improvements. | | [DeathLog](https://modrinth.com/mod/deathlog) | Tracks player deaths with detailed logs and statistics. | | [Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched) | Adds custom stitched stone structures for world-building and decoration. | | [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete) | Adds concrete-related blocks and mechanics for more building options. | | [M.R.U](https://modrinth.com/mod/mru) | A utility mod for managing Minecraft resources and performance. | | [Hardcore Revival](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-revival) | Revives the player after death in Hardcore mode, allowing for a second chance. | | [Gravestones](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumono_gravestones) | Adds gravestones that store player loot upon death. | | [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) | Enhances the third-person camera and perspective for a better experience. | | [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) | A utility mod that simplifies modding with additional features and APIs. | | [Snow Under Trees (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-under-trees-remastered) | Makes snow accumulate under trees during snowy biomes, creating a more realistic landscape. | | [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) | Optimizes the game's performance, especially on low-end hardware, by improving graphics. | | [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) | Clumps nearby experience orbs together to reduce lag and improve performance. | | [[EMF] Entity Model
